summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of RAMP verification system with PostgreSQL. All 25 tests passed covering: verification config, pending outcomes, scheduler, complete verification flow, insufficient data handling, learning records, relational chain with SQL JOINs, and HOW/WHERE lens endpoints.
seed_data_creation: Tests use demo endpoints /api/system/demo/complete-verification-flow and /api/system/demo/insufficient-data-scenario which create/reset seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend verification system tests pass. Key endpoints tested: /api/system/verification/config (returns configurable windows by state_family and intervention_type), /api/system/verification/pending (shows pending outcomes), /api/system/verification/run (processes pending outcomes), /api/system/demo/complete-verification-flow (creates verified outcome with savings/confidence), /api/system/demo/insufficient-data-scenario (marks INSUFFICIENT_DATA correctly), /api/system/learning/{asset_id} (learning records), /api/system/checkpoint/relational-chain (SQL JOINs verification). HOW lens (/api/how/*) and WHERE lens (/api/where/*) endpoints also work correctly.
passed_tests: TestVerificationConfig::test_verification_config_has_intervention_type_configs - ADJUSTMENT, REPAIR, REPLACEMENT, CALIBRATION, MAINTENANCE configs with correct windows
TestPendingOutcomes::test_pending_outcomes_endpoint_exists - Pending endpoint returns count and outcomes
TestVerificationFrozenBaseline::test_verification_uses_frozen_baseline - Savings calculated against frozen baseline value
